scripts.setcap: sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin=eip' src-tauri/target/debug/sv-publisher && echo '✅ Capabilities set on debug binary'
scripts.setcap:release: sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin=eip' src-tauri/target/release/sv-publisher && echo '✅ Capabilities set on release binary'
scripts.dev: npm run tauri build -- --debug && npm run setcap && npm run tauri dev
scripts.docs:watch: nodemon --watch web/js --watch web/shared --ext js --exec "npm run docs"
